{{CargoOrgan
|name=Salamander's Tail
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10817
|idx=18
|description="It rushed towards us, the damn lizard rushed towards us! Can you believe that? It had flames coming out of its body!"
—Solaces Expedition Notes
|skill=
|hp=760
|def=101
|atk=148
|rush=92
|gene1=When in Dragon Form:
> Gain +2% Dragon Chests in explorations
|gene2=In Dragon Form, {race} ATK +20
|gene3=Snail Arena, Fire DMG +60
|gene7=When in Dragon Form:
> Gain +2% Dragon Chests in explorations (Awakened)
|}}
